ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time_utc" TEXT /* Launch time in UTC */,
  "booster_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booster version */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload */,
  "payload_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the payload */,
  "payload_model" TEXT /* Model of the payload */,
  "payload_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the payload */,
  "payload_mass_kg" REAL /* Mass of the payload in kilograms */,
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the orbit type */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission */,
  "mission_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission outcome */,
  "landing_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the landing outcome */,
  "launch_cost" REAL /* Cost of the launch */,
  "launch_status" TEXT /* Current status of the launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_orbit_id FOREIGN KEY ("orbit_id") REFERENCES orbits ("orbit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_booster_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("booster_version_id") REFERENCES booster_versions ("booster_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_landing_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("landing_outcome_id") REFERENCES landing_outcomes ("landing_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_mission_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_outcome_id") REFERENCES mission_outcomes ("mission_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total contract value for launched payloads */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_website" TEXT /* Website of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbits" (
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit type */,
  "orbit_type" TEXT /* Type of orbit (e.g., LEO, Geostationary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the orbit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated launch */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., cargo, research) */,
  "mission_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "mission_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "mission_duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the mission in days */,
  "mission_cost" REAL /* Cost of the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booster_versions" (
  "booster_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booster version */,
  "booster_version" TEXT /* Version of the booster */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the booster version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the booster capabilities */,
  "booster_type" TEXT /* Type of booster */,
  "booster_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the booster */,
  "booster_mass_kg" REAL /* Mass of the booster in kilograms */,
  "booster_thrust_kN" REAL /* Thrust of the booster in kilonewtons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booster_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landing_outcomes" (
  "landing_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the landing outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the landing outcome (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_outcomes" (
  "mission_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mission outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission outcome (e.g., Success, Partial Success) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "launch_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum launch capacity of the site per year */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of launch site */,
  "site_elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the user has access to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Mass of the payload in kilograms
Name of the customer or organization
Total contract value for launched payloads
Contact phone number of the customer
Unique identifier for each orbit type
Duration of the mission in days
Unique identifier for each booster version
Release date of the booster version
Mass of the booster in kilograms
Thrust of the booster in kilonewtons
Unique identifier for the landing outcome
Description of the landing outcome (e.g., Success, Failure)
Unique identifier for the mission outcome
Description of the mission outcome (e.g., Success, Partial Success)
Unique identifier for each launch site
Maximum launch capacity of the site per year
Elevation of the site in meters
Unique identifier for the access record
Name of the table the user has access to
